hero.title: Anthyphera
hero.subtitle: Reduce complexity. Back what holds.
hero.body: Anthyphera is a trading and investment firm. We study complex systems, test what stays stable across change, and put capital behind it.

method.title: One process. Many fields.
method.intro: We remove noise, test persistence, and act only when the structure is clear.

steps.title: Reduce
steps.body: Break complex systems down until the governing relationships can be seen.

steps.title: Test
steps.body: Keep only what remains stable across time, geography, and regime.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.body: Commit capital only when the evidence is clear and risk is defined.

revenue.title: How revenue is made
revenue.intro: Trading and capital allocation come first. Research exists to sharpen both.

pillars.title: Trading
pillars.body: We take positions when structure, pricing, and movement align.

pillars.title: Investing
pillars.body: We allocate capital to long-horizon opportunities shaped by durable constraints.

pillars.title: Advisory
pillars.body: We work selectively where our method has direct commercial use.

domains.title: Where the work applies
domains.intro: The method stays constant even as the field changes.

items.title: Philosophy
items.body: Clear premises, valid reasoning, and durable frameworks.

items.title: Infrastructure
items.body: Systems shaped by physical and institutional constraint.

items.title: Frontier Fields
items.body: New domains where noise is high and structure is still forming.

nameMeaning.title: Why Anthyphera
nameMeaning.body: The name comes from repeated reduction: remove what is extraneous until the governing ratio appears. That same logic shapes how we study systems, build conviction, and commit capital.

principles.title: What keeps the work honest
principles.intro: The firm is defined by operating discipline, not broad claims.

items.title: Empirical
items.body: Claims must be grounded in evidence.

items.title: Simple
items.body: Complexity is penalized unless it earns its place.

items.title: Defined
items.body: Failure conditions are stated before capital is deployed.

cta.title: Built to compound
cta.body: Returns deepen research. Research improves judgment. The cycle tightens over time.
